checks.name: audio chord recognition unit tests
checks.details: 22 tests passed, including the four code-review refinement cases.

checks.name: skill package validation
checks.details: skill-creator quick_validate reported Skill is valid.

checks.name: installed skill synchronization
checks.details: Repository and installed skill hashes both equal e932861e0f1b32be930fe0e0e336fce6c90077e948dc1cb2b7202e16a29746d9; receipt matches.

checks.name: supplied recording evidence extraction
checks.details: Current code produced evidence_ready with 124 segments, 124 non-authoritative recurrence descriptors, 69.837 and 139.675 BPM hypotheses, and multiple keys including C minor and E-flat major.

checks.name: measurement and judgment boundary
checks.details: Every tempo/grid requires agent selection, every recurrence descriptor requires agent interpretation, every chord segment forbids automatic selection and retains alternatives, and recursive key inspection found no final-decision or confidence fields.

checks.name: mismatched source duration
checks.details: A 20-second full mix and 19.5-second harmonic stem produced and validated 12 segments without frame-mask mismatch.

checks.name: partial evidence and preprocessing failures
checks.details: Tests confirm partial_evidence remains valid for weak rhythm while evidence_ready stays strict; invalid explicit binaries and ffmpeg failures return actionable errors.

checks.name: repository diff integrity
checks.details: git diff --check and Python compilation passed.

checks.name: web build and lint
checks.details: No application JavaScript, TypeScript, CSS, or rendered UI changed.

visual_checks.details: Not applicable to a non-visual skill, Python script, contract, and test change.
